name: Suede Skills MCP
summary: Local MCP access to Suede skill, copy, SEO, install, and QA context.

publicLinks.label: GitHub Pages site
publicLinks.description: Public landing page for Suede Creator Skills, install paths, docs, and stampable linkset.

publicLinks.label: Ambassador explainer
publicLinks.description: Long-form Markdown guide for ambassadors explaining Suedify, public skills, MCP, SEO audits, QA, social posts, emails, FAQ, and claim boundaries.

publicLinks.label: Copy bank
publicLinks.description: Public copy bank for GitHub, docs, CTA, SEO, FAQ, social, and safety copy.

publicLinks.label: Public installs and MCP
publicLinks.description: Public GitHub skill install commands and Suede Skills MCP guidance.

plugins.name: suede-workflow-skills
plugins.description: Public Suede workflow skills for design, copy, SEO, code review, agent teams, launch packaging, install support, claim checks, site polish, and reference-site restyling.

plugins.name: suede-creator-skills
plugins.description: Public creator skills for music release linting, rights passports, rights audits, provenance maps, licensing prep, and royalty routing briefs.
plugins.publicInstall: python3 ~/.codex/skills/.system/skill-installer/scripts/install-skill-from-github.py --repo JasonColapietro/suede-creator-skills --path skills/music-release-metadata-linter skills/suede-rights-passport skills/suede-rights-audit skills/suede-provenance-map skills/suede-licensing-prep skills/suede-royalty-routing-brief

skills.name: suede-workflow-skills
skills.description: Public umbrella Suede workflow for Suedify, design, copy, SEO audits, site polish, code review, agent-team QA, install support, launch packaging, and claim checks.
skills.useWhen: Use when a user wants the full Suede workflow pack loaded from one public GitHub skill path.

skills.name: suedify
skills.description: Two-URL website restyling workflow that studies a reference URL and transforms a target URL with Suede-safe design fidelity.
skills.useWhen: Use when asked to mimic, restyle, or make one website feel like another reference site while preserving brand and legal safety.

skills.name: suede-design
skills.description: Suede frontend design, redesign, UI polish, visual audit, design-system, responsive QA, and implementation handoff workflow.
skills.useWhen: Use for Suede websites, app surfaces, dashboards, campaign pages, onboarding, empty states, forms, components, tokens, typography, layout, motion, imagery, public copy, or design-related frontend changes.

skills.name: suede-copy
skills.description: Suede conversion copy, public docs copy, GitHub README copy, SEO snippets, CTAs, launch copy, line editing, and full SEO copy audit workflow.
skills.useWhen: Use for Suede website text, skill pages, public docs, GitHub Pages copy, README sections, metadata, headings, subheads, buttons, FAQ answers, launch notes, or SEO copy audits.

skills.name: suede-brand-voice
skills.description: Suede brand voice workflow for public copy, README prose, docs, CTAs, FAQs, social copy, launch language, skill descriptions, and ambassador text.
skills.useWhen: Use when copy should sound specific, creator-owned, rights-aware, agent-commerce-aware, polished, and free of generic AI phrasing.

skills.name: suede-seo-audit
skills.description: Suede SEO, AEO, metadata, schema, internal-link, crawlability, search-intent, and public docs audit workflow.
skills.useWhen: Use when auditing Suede pages, GitHub Pages sites, README files, skill docs, launch pages, copy banks, install pages, sitemap entries, or public surfaces.

skills.name: suede-site-alchemy
skills.description: Suede website, landing page, campaign page, SEO/AEO, CTA routing, conversion, and page polish workflow.
skills.useWhen: Use for improving pages, packaging Suede Sites-style website growth offers, or routing app requests into Suede app-builder workflow.

skills.name: suede-code-review
skills.description: Suede full-context code review, PR review, release gate, security sweep, architecture critique, regression hunt, and fix brief workflow.
skills.useWhen: Use for production behavior, auth, payments, rights/provenance, registry systems, royalty routing, agent commerce, dashboards, APIs, public claims, shared components, or multi-repo contracts.

skills.name: suede-agent-teams
skills.description: Suede agent team orchestration for major planning, implementation, review, design QA, release, and recovery work.
skills.useWhen: Use when a Suede task is large, risky, cross-surface, multi-repo, release-bound, design-heavy, or benefits from parallel lanes.

skills.name: suede-launch-packaging
skills.description: Suede launch packaging workflow for public releases, GitHub Pages updates, README launches, skill-pack releases, docs launches, social/email copy, proof links, install commands, QA, and handoff notes.
skills.useWhen: Use when preparing a Suede skill, repo, site, MCP server, feature, or public docs update to be shared.

skills.name: suede-install-support
skills.description: Suede public install support for Codex skills, Claude skills, GitHub skill folders, MCP setup, local plugin notes, installer command QA, and ambassador-safe install instructions.
skills.useWhen: Use when install commands fail, public users cannot add a skill, @personal appears in public copy, or docs need a simpler install path.

skills.name: suede-mcp-qa
skills.description: Suede MCP server QA workflow for stdio JSON-RPC tools, resources, prompts, catalog output, install options, SEO audit scaffolds, QA checklists, protocol errors, and docs alignment.
skills.useWhen: Use when building, changing, testing, or explaining the Suede Skills MCP.

skills.name: suede-ambassador-explainer
skills.description: Suede ambassador explanation workflow for public talk tracks, DMs, posts, emails, FAQs, onboarding copy, skill-pack explanations, install guidance, objection handling, and claim-safe routing.
skills.useWhen: Use when writing language for ambassadors who need to explain Suede skills, workflows, MCP, Suedify, creator-rights tooling, or public install paths.

skills.name: suede-public-claim-check
skills.description: Suede public claim check workflow for copy, docs, READMEs, launch pages, skill descriptions, ambassador language, social posts, emails, metadata, and MCP output.
skills.useWhen: Use when public wording may imply unsupported traction, legal clearance, payouts, registry writes, private access, guaranteed outcomes, or misleading install availability.

skills.name: suede-agent-commerce
skills.description: Suede agent commerce preparation workflow for making creative works, skill packs, docs, rights packages, licensing notes, install commands, and public metadata readable to agents.
skills.useWhen: Use when a Suede asset should be easier for AI agents to inspect, route, license, recommend, transact around, or QA safely.

skills.name: music-release-metadata-linter
skills.description: Audit music, audio, video, artwork, and creative release folders for metadata, rights, split, file, and Suede intake gaps.
skills.useWhen: Use before release, licensing, registry preparation, royalty routing, agent commerce, or Suede transfer.

skills.name: suede-rights-passport
skills.description: Prepare creator folders for Suede intake with provenance, rights, credits, splits, licenses, media optimization notes, and missing-info reports.
skills.useWhen: Use when packaging a project into a Suede-ready transfer package.

skills.name: suede-rights-audit
skills.description: Suede creator-rights audit workflow for ownership claims, contributors, credits, royalty splits, sample status, license notes, release history, public URLs, metadata gaps, and provenance gaps.
skills.useWhen: Use before rights passporting, licensing prep, registry readiness, royalty routing, or Suede creator intake.

skills.name: suede-provenance-map
skills.description: Suede provenance mapping workflow for source files, stems, masters, artwork, lyrics, documents, metadata, public URLs, hashes, evidence trails, unknown origins, and review notes.
skills.useWhen: Use when mapping where a creative work came from before rights passporting, licensing review, registry prep, or agent commerce.

skills.name: suede-licensing-prep
skills.description: Suede licensing preparation workflow for music, media, rights notes, sample status, contributor approvals, public URLs, sync/licensing readiness, restrictions, clearance gaps, and safe outreach materials.
skills.useWhen: Use when a creator project needs to be organized for licensing discussion, sync review, brand use, or partner review without claiming clearance.

skills.name: suede-royalty-routing-brief
skills.description: Suede royalty routing brief workflow for split readiness, contributor payment roles, royalty destinations, payout caveats, missing confirmations, data needed for routing, and public-safe royalty language.
skills.useWhen: Use when preparing creator projects for royalty routing discussion, intake review, or agent-readable rights packaging.
